steps.title: Compare the target minerals
steps.content: The goal is to compare talc and topaz. The notes say talc has a Mohs number of 1, topaz has a Mohs number of 8, and minerals with larger numbers are harder and can scratch minerals with smaller numbers.

steps.title: Keep only the target comparison
steps.content: Choice A compares topaz with fluorite, Choice B only says the scale can order the minerals, and Choice C compares fluorite with talc. The relevant comparison is that topaz can scratch talc and is harder than talc. The answer is D.
